You said: HELP ME CODE A WEB PAGE ON EVENT PLANING

HELP ME CODE A WEB PAGE ON EVENT PLANING

9:24 AM

Claude responded: What type of event planning page do you want, and what vibe are you going for?

Reading frontend design skill

What type of event planning page do you want, and what vibe are you going for? Pick one from each question above and I'll build it for you!

You said: ALL OF THE ABOVE

ALL OF THE ABOVE

9:25 AM

Claude responded: Here's your complete Éclat Events website — all four sections in one elegant page:

Created a file, read a file

Here's your complete Éclat Events website — all four sections in one elegant page:

What's included:

  1. Landing Page (Hero) — Animated headline, stats counter (850+ events, 98% satisfaction), and dual CTA buttons. A luxury dark-gold aesthetic with a grid overlay.
  2. Services Section — Four service cards (Weddings, Corporate Galas, Private Celebrations, Festivals) with hover effects and gold underline animations.
  3. Portfolio / Showcase — Five event cards in an asymmetric editorial grid, each with category tags, guest counts, and a cinematic hover zoom.
  4. Booking Form — Full enquiry form with a live guest counter (+/−), service checkboxes, budget selector, and a success confirmation screen on submit.
  5. Dashboard — Stats panel (revenue, events, satisfaction), an upcoming events list with status badges (Confirmed / Planning / Draft / Pending), and an activity timeline.
  6. Testimonials + Footer — Three client reviews and a clean footer.

Design choices: Cormorant Garamond serif + DM Sans, dark charcoal background, gold (#C9A84C) accents, scroll-reveal animations, and fully mobile responsive. Feel free to ask me to change the colour scheme, add new sections, or localise the content further!

Event planning
Code · HTML 

You said: CAN YOU GIVE ME THE CODES YOU'VE USED

CAN YOU GIVE ME THE CODES YOU'VE USED

10:00 AM

Claude responded: Here's the complete code — same file you already have, just displayed in full so you can copy it:

Here's the complete code — same file you already have, just displayed in full so you can copy it:

html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Éclat Events — Premium Event Planning</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  :root {
    --gold: #C9A84C;
    --gold-light: #E8D49A;
    --gold-dark: #9A7830;
    --cream: #FAF7F2;
    --dark: #1A1713;
    --dark-2: #2D2920;
    --dark-3: #3F3A30;
    --muted: #9A9080;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --serif: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    --sans: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --transition: 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    background: var(--dark);
    color: var(--cream);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1.4rem 4rem;
    background: rgba(26,23,19,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
    transition: padding var(--transition);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1.6rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: var(--gold);
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .nav-logo span { font-style: italic; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.4rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--cream);
    text-decoration: none;
    opacity: 0.75;
    transition: opacity var(--transition);
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { opacity: 1; color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-cta {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.6rem 1.6rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--gold);
    color: var(--gold);
    background: transparent;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all var(--transition);
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); }

  /* SECTION HELPERS */
  section { padding: 6rem 4rem; }
  .section-tag {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.15;
    color: var(--cream);
  }
  .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); }
  .divider {
    width: 60px; height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), transparent);
    margin: 1.8rem 0;
  }

  /* HERO */
  #hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 10rem 4rem 6rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 80% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 20% 80%, rgba(201,168,76,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }
  .hero-grid {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; opacity: 0.04;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,0.5) 1px, transparent 1px),
                      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.5) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 80px 80px;
  }
  #hero > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.9s 0.2s forwards;
  }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 7rem);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: var(--cream);
    max-width: 800px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.9s 0.4s forwards;
  }
  .hero-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); display: block; }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    max-width: 460px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-top: 2rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.9s 0.6s forwards;
  }
  .hero-actions {
    display: flex; gap: 1.2rem; margin-top: 3rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.9s 0.8s forwards;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 1rem 2.4rem;
    background: var(--gold);
    color: var(--dark);
    border: none; cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-block;
    transition: all var(--transition);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-outline {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 1rem 2.4rem;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--cream);
    border: 1px solid rgba(250,247,242,0.3);
    cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-block;
    transition: all var(--transition);
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }
  .hero-stats {
    display: flex; gap: 3rem; margin-top: 5rem;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.9s 1s forwards;
  }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 2.8rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--gold);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-top: 0.4rem;
  }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* SERVICES */
  #services { background: var(--dark-2); }
  .services-header { max-width: 540px; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .services-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5px;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  }
  .service-card {
    background: var(--dark-2);
    padding: 2.8rem 2.4rem;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
    transition: all var(--transition);
    cursor: pointer;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .service-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
    background: var(--gold);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform var(--transition);
  }
  .service-card:hover { background: var(--dark-3); }
  .service-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .service-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1.4rem; display: block; }
  .service-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--cream);
    margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }
  .service-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.8; }
  .service-link {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-top: 1.4rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: gap var(--transition);
  }
  .service-link:hover { gap: 0.9rem; }

  /* SHOWCASE */
  #showcase { background: var(--dark); }
  .showcase-intro { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }
  .showcase-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr 1fr;
    grid-template-rows: auto auto;
    gap: 1.5px;
  }
  .event-card {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    background: var(--dark-3);
  }
  .event-card:first-child { grid-row: 1 / 3; aspect-ratio: unset; min-height: 500px; }
  .event-card-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-size: cover; background-position: center;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    filter: brightness(0.65);
  }
  .event-card:hover .event-card-bg { transform: scale(1.05); filter: brightness(0.75); }
  .event-card-body {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 1.6rem 1.8rem;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(26,23,19,0.92) 0%, transparent 100%);
    transform: translateY(4px);
    transition: transform var(--transition);
  }
  .event-card:hover .event-card-body { transform: translateY(0); }
  .event-tag { font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .event-name { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--cream); }
  .event-card:first-child .event-name { font-size: 2rem; }
  .event-meta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.5rem; }

  .ev1 .event-card-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2D1B0E 0%, #5C3A1E 40%, #8B4513 70%, #C46B1A 100%); }
  .ev2 .event-card-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D1B2A 0%, #1B3A5C 40%, #2E5F8A 70%, #3B7AB5 100%); }
  .ev3 .event-card-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A0D2E 0%, #3D1F5C 40%, #6B3A8A 70%, #8B4DB5 100%); }
  .ev4 .event-card-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D2A1E 0%, #1A5C3A 40%, #2E8A5F 70%, #3BB580 100%); }
  .ev5 .event-card-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2A1A0D 0%, #5C3A1A 40%, #8A5F2E 70%, #B58B3B 100%); }

  /* BOOKING FORM */
  #booking { background: var(--dark-2); }
  .booking-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; align-items: start; }
  .booking-info p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.9; margin-top: 1.2rem; max-width: 400px; }
  .booking-features { margin-top: 2.4rem; }
  .booking-feature { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); }
  .feature-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .feature-text { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; }
  .feature-text strong { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; display: block; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }

  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
  .field { margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }
  .field label { display: block; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .field input, .field select, .field textarea {
    width: 100%;
    background: rgba(250,247,242,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color var(--transition), background var(--transition);
    appearance: none;
  }
  .field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--gold);
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.04);
  }
  .field select option { background: var(--dark-2); color: var(--cream); }
  .field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 120px; }
  .field input::placeholder, .field textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(154,144,128,0.5); }
  .guest-counter { display: flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); width: fit-content; }
  .guest-btn { width: 40px; height: 42px; background: transparent; border: none; color: var(--gold); font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--transition); }
  .guest-btn:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); }
  #guest-count { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--cream); min-width: 60px; text-align: center; padding: 0 0.5rem; }
  .services-select { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 0.4rem; }
  .service-check { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; padding: 0.65rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition); }
  .service-check:hover { border-color: var(--gold); }
  .service-check input[type="checkbox"] { width: 14px; height: 14px; accent-color: var(--gold); cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; margin: 0; padding: 0; border: none; }
  .service-check span { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .service-check:has(input:checked) { border-color: var(--gold); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.06); }
  .service-check:has(input:checked) span { color: var(--cream); }
  .form-submit { margin-top: 2rem; width: 100%; padding: 1.1rem; background: var(--gold); border: none; color: var(--dark); font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition); }
  .form-submit:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .form-success { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 3rem 2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); }
  .form-success.show { display: block; }
  .success-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .success-title { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--gold); }
  .success-sub { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.6rem; }

  /* DASHBOARD */
  #dashboard { background: var(--dark); }
  .dash-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 3rem; }
  .dash-meta { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .dash-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1px; margin-bottom: 3rem; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); }
  .dash-stat { background: var(--dark); padding: 1.8rem 1.6rem; transition: background var(--transition); }
  .dash-stat:hover { background: var(--dark-2); }
  .stat-value { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--cream); }
  .stat-value span { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--gold); }
  .dash-stat .stat-label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 0.4rem; }
  .stat-change { font-size: 0.75rem; margin-top: 0.3rem; }
  .stat-change.up { color: #6fcf97; }
  .stat-change.down { color: #eb5757; }
  .dash-main { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .panel { background: var(--dark-2); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08); }
  .panel-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 1.4rem 1.8rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.08); }
  .panel-title { font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cream); }
  .panel-action { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--gold); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: opacity var(--transition); }
  .panel-action:hover { opacity: 0.7; }
  .event-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.2rem; padding: 1.1rem 1.8rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.05); transition: background var(--transition); cursor: pointer; }
  .event-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .event-row:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.03); }
  .event-dot { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .event-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .event-row-name { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--cream); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
  .event-row-date { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.2rem; }
  .event-badge { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.2rem 0.65rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .badge-confirmed { background: rgba(111,207,151,0.15); color: #6fcf97; }
  .badge-planning { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15); color: var(--gold); }
  .badge-draft { background: rgba(154,144,128,0.12); color: var(--muted); }
  .badge-pending { background: rgba(235,87,87,0.12); color: #eb8787; }
  .timeline { padding: 1.2rem 1.8rem; }
  .tl-item { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }
  .tl-item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .tl-spine { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .tl-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 4px; }
  .tl-line { width: 1px; flex: 1; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15); margin: 4px 0; }
  .tl-title { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--cream); }
  .tl-date { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.2rem; }
  .tl-dot.gold { background: var(--gold); }
  .tl-dot.green { background: #6fcf97; }
  .tl-dot.blue { background: #56a8e0; }
  .tl-dot.muted { background: var(--muted); }

  /* TESTIMONIALS */
  #testimonials { background: var(--dark-2); padding: 5rem 4rem; }
  .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5px; margin-top: 3.5rem; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); }
  .testimonial { background: var(--dark-2); padding: 2.4rem; transition: background var(--transition); }
  .testimonial:hover { background: var(--dark-3); }
  .testimonial-stars { color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
  .testimonial-text { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.1rem; font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; color: var(--cream); line-height: 1.8; }
  .testimonial-author { margin-top: 1.4rem; padding-top: 1.2rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); }
  .author-name { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--cream); }
  .author-event { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.2rem; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer { padding: 4rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .footer-logo { font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--gold); }
  .footer-copy { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; }
  .footer-links a { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; transition: color var(--transition); }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* SCROLL REVEAL */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(32px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
    #hero { padding: 8rem 1.5rem 4rem; }
    .booking-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; }
    .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .showcase-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .event-card:first-child { min-height: 260px; }
    .dash-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .dash-main { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; text-align: center; }
    .hero-stats { gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .showcase-intro { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo"><span>Éclat</span> Events</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#showcase">Portfolio</a></li>
    <li><a href="#booking">Book</a></li>
    <li><a href="#dashboard">Dashboard</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#booking" class="nav-cta">Get a Quote</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <p class="hero-eyebrow">Premium Event Planning</p>
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    We craft moments
    <em>worth remembering.</em>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">From intimate gatherings to grand galas, Éclat Events transforms your vision into extraordinary experiences that leave lasting impressions.</p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="#booking" class="btn-primary">Start Planning</a>
    <a href="#showcase" class="btn-outline">View Portfolio</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div><div class="stat-num">850+</div><div class="stat-label">Events Executed</div></div>
    <div><div class="stat-num">98%</div><div class="stat-label">Client Satisfaction</div></div>
    <div><div class="stat-num">12</div><div class="stat-label">Years of Excellence</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="services-header reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">What We Do</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Every detail,<br><em>perfectly orchestrated.</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="services-grid reveal">
    <div class="service-card" onclick="document.getElementById('booking').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      <span class="service-icon">💍</span>
      <h3 class="service-name">Weddings & Ceremonies</h3>
      <p class="service-desc">From intimate elopements to extravagant celebrations, we curate every element of your most important day with meticulous care.</p>
      <a class="service-link" href="#booking">Enquire now →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card" onclick="document.getElementById('booking').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      <span class="service-icon">🏛️</span>
      <h3 class="service-name">Corporate Galas</h3>
      <p class="service-desc">Elevate your brand with sophisticated corporate events — from product launches to annual awards ceremonies that impress and inspire.</p>
      <a class="service-link" href="#booking">Enquire now →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card" onclick="document.getElementById('booking').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      <span class="service-icon">🎉</span>
      <h3 class="service-name">Private Celebrations</h3>
      <p class="service-desc">Milestone birthdays, anniversary dinners, and exclusive soirées crafted to reflect your personal style and create unforgettable memories.</p>
      <a class="service-link" href="#booking">Enquire now →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card" onclick="document.getElementById('booking').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      <span class="service-icon">🎪</span>
      <h3 class="service-name">Festivals & Exhibitions</h3>
      <p class="service-desc">Large-scale multi-day events, cultural festivals, art exhibitions, and immersive brand experiences that captivate thousands.</p>
      <a class="service-link" href="#booking">Enquire now →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SHOWCASE -->
<section id="showcase">
  <div class="showcase-intro reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-tag">Portfolio</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Recent<br><em>masterpieces.</em></h2>
    </div>
    <a href="#booking" class="btn-outline" style="white-space:nowrap">View All Events</a>
  </div>
  <div class="showcase-grid reveal">
    <div class="event-card ev1">
      <div class="event-card-bg"></div>
      <div class="event-card-body">
        <p class="event-tag">Wedding · 2024</p>
        <h3 class="event-name">The Rothbury Estate Ceremony</h3>
        <div class="event-meta"><span>📍 Nairobi, Kenya</span><span>👥 320 guests</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card ev2">
      <div class="event-card-bg"></div>
      <div class="event-card-body">
        <p class="event-tag">Corporate · 2024</p>
        <h3 class="event-name">Azure Summit Gala</h3>
        <div class="event-meta"><span>👥 500 guests</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card ev3">
      <div class="event-card-bg"></div>
      <div class="event-card-body">
        <p class="event-tag">Private · 2024</p>
        <h3 class="event-name">Velvet Masquerade</h3>
        <div class="event-meta"><span>👥 80 guests</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card ev4">
      <div class="event-card-bg"></div>
      <div class="event-card-body">
        <p class="event-tag">Festival · 2023</p>
        <h3 class="event-name">Emerald Arts Weekend</h3>
        <div class="event-meta"><span>👥 4,000 guests</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="event-card ev5">
      <div class="event-card-bg"></div>
      <div class="event-card-body">
        <p class="event-tag">Wedding · 2023</p>
        <h3 class="event-name">Golden Hour Garden Party</h3>
        <div class="event-meta"><span>👥 150 guests</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BOOKING FORM -->
<section id="booking">
  <div class="booking-layout">
    <div class="booking-info reveal">
      <p class="section-tag">Book With Us</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Let's plan your<br><em>perfect event.</em></h2>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <p>Tell us about your vision and we'll connect you with our team within 24 hours. Every great event begins with a conversation.</p>
      <div class="booking-features">
        <div class="booking-feature">
          <div class="feature-dot"></div>
          <div class="feature-text"><strong>Free Initial Consultation</strong>A 60-minute discovery session with your dedicated planner, completely complimentary.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="booking-feature">
          <div class="feature-dot"></div>
          <div class="feature-text"><strong>Custom Proposals Within 48hrs</strong>Receive a detailed plan, moodboard, and transparent pricing tailored to your event.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="booking-feature">
          <div class="feature-dot"></div>
          <div class="feature-text"><strong>Dedicated Event Manager</strong>One point of contact from planning through to the final guest's departure.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="booking-form reveal">
      <form id="event-form" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="field"><label>First Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Amara" required></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Last Name</label><input type="text" placeholder="Osei" required></div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="field"><label>Email Address</label><input type="email" placeholder="amara@example.com" required></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Phone Number</label><input type="tel" placeholder="+256 700 000 000"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Event Type</label>
          <select required>
            <option value="" disabled selected>Select event type</option>
            <option>Wedding & Ceremony</option>
            <option>Corporate Gala</option>
            <option>Private Celebration</option>
            <option>Festival / Exhibition</option>
            <option>Other</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="field"><label>Preferred Date</label><input type="date" required></div>
          <div class="field"><label>Event Venue / Location</label><input type="text" placeholder="Kampala, Uganda"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Number of Guests</label>
          <div class="guest-counter">
            <button type="button" class="guest-btn" onclick="adjustGuests(-10)">−</button>
            <span id="guest-count">50</span>
            <button type="button" class="guest-btn" onclick="adjustGuests(10)">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Services Required</label>
          <div class="services-select">
            <label class="service-check"><input type="checkbox" checked><span>Full Event Planning</span></label>
            <label class="service-check"><input type="checkbox"><span>Catering & Bar</span></label>
            <label class="service-check"><input type="checkbox" checked><span>Décor & Florals</span></label>
            <label class="service-check"><input type="checkbox"><span>Photography</span></label>
            <label class="service-check"><input type="checkbox"><span>Entertainment</span></label>
            <label class="service-check"><input type="checkbox"><span>Transport</span></label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Approximate Budget</label>
          <select>
            <option value="" disabled selected>Select budget range</option>
            <option>Under $5,000</option>
            <option>$5,000 – $15,000</option>
            <option>$15,000 – $50,000</option>
            <option>$50,000 – $150,000</option>
            <option>$150,000+</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Tell Us Your Vision</label>
          <textarea placeholder="Share the story you want your event to tell…"></textarea>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="form-submit">Send My Event Brief</button>
      </form>
      <div class="form-success" id="form-success">
        <div class="success-icon">✨</div>
        <div class="success-title">Brief Received!</div>
        <p class="success-sub">Thank you. Your dedicated planner will reach out within 24 hours.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DASHBOARD -->
<section id="dashboard">
  <div class="dash-header reveal">
    <div>
      <p class="section-tag">Event Dashboard</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Your events,<br><em>at a glance.</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-meta">Updated: May 2026</div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-grid reveal">
    <div class="dash-stat">
      <div class="stat-value">24<span>&nbsp;active</span></div>
      <div class="stat-label">Upcoming Events</div>
      <div class="stat-change up">↑ 4 from last month</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-stat">
      <div class="stat-value">$1.2M</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Revenue This Year</div>
      <div class="stat-change up">↑ 18% year on year</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-stat">
      <div class="stat-value">98<span>%</span></div>
      <div class="stat-label">Client Satisfaction</div>
      <div class="stat-change up">↑ 2% this quarter</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-stat">
      <div class="stat-value">7</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Pending Enquiries</div>
      <div class="stat-change down">↓ 3 to follow up</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="dash-main reveal">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <span class="panel-title">Upcoming Events</span>
        <a class="panel-action" href="#booking">+ Add Event</a>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-body">
        <div class="event-row">
          <div class="event-dot">💍</div>
          <div class="event-info">
            <div class="event-row-name">Nakato & Daniel — Wedding Reception</div>
            <div class="event-row-date">15 June 2026 · Speke Resort, Munyonyo</div>
          </div>
          <span class="event-badge badge-confirmed">Confirmed</span>
        </div>
        <div class="event-row">
          <div class="event-dot">🏛️</div>
          <div class="event-info">
            <div class="event-row-name">TechHub East Africa Annual Summit</div>
            <div class="event-row-date">22 June 2026 · Kampala Serena Hotel</div>
          </div>
          <span class="event-badge badge-planning">Planning</span>
        </div>
        <div class="event-row">
          <div class="event-dot">🎉</div>
          <div class="event-info">
            <div class="event-row-name">Grace Achieng — 50th Birthday Gala</div>
            <div class="event-row-date">4 July 2026 · Private Residence</div>
          </div>
          <span class="event-badge badge-planning">Planning</span>
        </div>
        <div class="event-row">
          <div class="event-dot">🎪</div>
          <div class="event-info">
            <div class="event-row-name">Colours of Africa Arts Festival</div>
            <div class="event-row-date">12–14 July 2026 · Kololo Ceremonial Grounds</div>
          </div>
          <span class="event-badge badge-draft">Draft</span>
        </div>
        <div class="event-row">
          <div class="event-dot">💍</div>
          <div class="event-info">
            <div class="event-row-name">Kiiza & Mwesigwa — Garden Ceremony</div>
            <div class="event-row-date">2 August 2026 · Entebbe Gardens</div>
          </div>
          <span class="event-badge badge-pending">Pending</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-header">
        <span class="panel-title">Activity Timeline</span>
        <a class="panel-action" href="#">View all</a>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-body">
        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot gold"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
            <div class="tl-content"><div class="tl-title">Venue deposit confirmed — Speke Resort</div><div class="tl-date">Today, 9:14 AM</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot green"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
            <div class="tl-content"><div class="tl-title">New enquiry: Colours of Africa Festival</div><div class="tl-date">Yesterday, 3:40 PM</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot blue"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
            <div class="tl-content"><div class="tl-title">Florist proposal reviewed — Nakato Wedding</div><div class="tl-date">12 May, 11:00 AM</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot gold"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
            <div class="tl-content"><div class="tl-title">TechHub catering contract signed</div><div class="tl-date">11 May, 2:15 PM</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item">
            <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot muted"></div></div>
            <div class="tl-content"><div class="tl-title">Grace Achieng — mood board approved</div><div class="tl-date">10 May, 10:30 AM</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section id="testimonials">
  <div class="reveal">
    <p class="section-tag">Client Stories</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">What our clients<br><em>say about us.</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="testimonials-grid reveal">
    <div class="testimonial">
      <div class="testimonial-stars">★ ★ ★ ★ ★</div>
      <p class="testimonial-text">"Every single detail was beyond our imagination. Éclat didn't just plan our wedding — they painted our love story in gold."</p>
      <div class="testimonial-author">
        <div class="author-name">Amara & Kwame Osei</div>
        <div class="author-event">Wedding, Kampala 2024</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="testimonial">
      <div class="testimonial-stars">★ ★ ★ ★ ★</div>
      <p class="testimonial-text">"Our product launch exceeded every KPI. The atmosphere they created was sophisticated, energetic, and perfectly on-brand."</p>
      <div class="testimonial-author">
        <div class="author-name">Sarah Kimani</div>
        <div class="author-event">Corporate Launch, Nairobi 2024</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="testimonial">
      <div class="testimonial-stars">★ ★ ★ ★ ★</div>
      <p class="testimonial-text">"I handed them a vague idea and a guest list. What emerged was the most magical evening of my life. Truly extraordinary."</p>
      <div class="testimonial-author">
        <div class="author-name">Josephine Nambooze</div>
        <div class="author-event">50th Birthday Gala, Entebbe 2023</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo"><span style="font-style:italic">Éclat</span> Events</div>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 Éclat Events. Crafting extraordinary experiences.</p>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="#services">Services</a>
    <a href="#showcase">Portfolio</a>
    <a href="#booking">Contact</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Scroll reveal
  const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((e, i) => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 80);
        observer.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
  revealEls.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // Guest counter
  let guests = 50;
  function adjustGuests(delta) {
    guests = Math.max(10, Math.min(5000, guests + delta));
    document.getElementById('guest-count').textContent = guests;
  }

  // Form submit
  function handleSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.getElementById('event-form').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('form-success').classList.add('show');
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>

Save this as index.html and open it in any browser — no server or extra tools needed. Let me know if you'd like to change anything, like the colour scheme, your business name, or add new features!

You said: I need Events planing for beginner in Coding

I need Events planing for beginner in Coding

10:15 AM

Claude responded: Here's a beginner-friendly breakdown of the code, section by section:

Here's a beginner-friendly breakdown of the code, section by section:

The 3 Languages Used

Every webpage uses exactly 3 things:

LanguageWhat it doesThink of it as...
HTMLThe structure/contentThe skeleton
CSSThe colours & designThe clothes
JavaScriptThe interactive bitsThe brain

1. HTML — Building the Structure

html
<!DOCTYPE html>           <!-- Tells the browser: "this is a webpage" -->
<html lang="en">          <!-- Start of the whole page -->
<head>                    <!-- Hidden settings (title, fonts, styles) -->
  <title>My Event Page</title>
</head>
<body>                    <!-- Everything the user SEES goes here -->

  <h1>Welcome</h1>        <!-- Big heading -->
  <p>Some text</p>        <!-- A paragraph -->
  <button>Click me</button> <!-- A button -->

</body>
</html>

Key rule: Every tag you open <div> you must close </div>.

2. CSS — Making it Look Good

css
/* Select an element, then style it */
body {
  background: black;    /* page background colour */
  color: white;         /* text colour */
  font-family: Arial;   /* font style */
}

h1 {
  font-size: 3rem;      /* text size (rem = relative to screen) */
  color: gold;          /* text colour */
}

button {
  padding: 10px 20px;   /* space inside the button (top/bottom, left/right) */
  background: gold;
  border: none;         /* removes the default border */
  cursor: pointer;      /* shows a hand when hovering */
}

Key rule: CSS lives inside <style> tags in your HTML, or in a separate .css file.

3. A Simple Starter Event Page

Copy this into a file called index.html and open it in your browser:

html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>My Event Page</title>
  <style>

    /* --- BASIC RESET --- */
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

    /* --- PAGE STYLE --- */
    body {
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
      background: #1a1a1a;   /* dark background */
      color: white;
    }

    /* --- NAVIGATION BAR --- */
    nav {
      background: #111;
      padding: 15px 30px;
      display: flex;               /* puts items side by side */
      justify-content: space-between; /* spreads them apart */
      align-items: center;         /* vertically centres them */
    }
    .logo { color: gold; font-size: 1.4rem; }
    .nav-btn {
      background: gold;
      color: black;
      border: none;
      padding: 8px 18px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* --- HERO SECTION (big top area) --- */
    .hero {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 100px 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a, #2d2415);
    }
    .hero h1 { font-size: 3rem; color: gold; margin-bottom: 15px; }
    .hero p  { color: #aaa; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 30px; }
    .hero-btn {
      background: gold;
      color: black;
      border: none;
      padding: 14px 32px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .hero-btn:hover { background: #e8d49a; } /* lighter gold on hover */

    /* --- SERVICES SECTION --- */
    .services {
      padding: 60px 30px;
      background: #222;
    }
    .services h2 { text-align: center; color: gold; margin-bottom: 40px; font-size: 2rem; }

    /* Grid = automatic columns side by side */
    .cards {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); /* 3 equal columns */
      gap: 20px;                              /* space between cards */
    }
    .card {
      background: #2d2d2d;
      padding: 30px;
      border: 1px solid #444;
      text-align: center;
      transition: border-color 0.3s; /* smooth hover effect */
    }
    .card:hover { border-color: gold; } /* gold border on hover */
    .card-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 15px; }
    .card h3   { color: white; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .card p    { color: #888; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; }

    /* --- BOOKING FORM --- */
    .booking {
      padding: 60px 30px;
      max-width: 600px;    /* limits form width */
      margin: 0 auto;      /* centres it on the page */
    }
    .booking h2 { color: gold; margin-bottom: 30px; font-size: 2rem; }

    label {
      display: block;          /* puts label on its own line */
      color: #aaa;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    input, select, textarea {
      width: 100%;
      background: #2d2d2d;
      border: 1px solid #444;
      color: white;
      padding: 12px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      outline: none;           /* removes blue outline on click */
    }
    input:focus, select:focus {
      border-color: gold;      /* gold border when typing */
    }
    textarea { height: 120px; resize: vertical; }

    .submit-btn {
      width: 100%;
      background: gold;
      color: black;
      border: none;
      padding: 14px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: bold;
      cursor: pointer;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    .submit-btn:hover { background: #e8d49a; }

    /* --- SUCCESS MESSAGE (hidden by default) --- */
    .success {
      display: none;           /* hidden until form is submitted */
      text-align: center;
      padding: 40px;
      color: gold;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      border: 1px solid gold;
    }

    /* --- FOOTER --- */
    footer {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 30px;
      background: #111;
      color: #666;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    /* --- MOBILE FRIENDLY --- */
    @media (max-width: 700px) {        /* when screen is narrow... */
      .cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }  /* stack cards vertically */
      .hero h1 { font-size: 2rem; }
    }

  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- NAVIGATION -->
  <nav>
    <div class="logo">✨ MyEvents</div>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="scrollTo('#booking')">Book Now</button>
  </nav>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero">
    <h1>Plan Your Perfect Event</h1>
    <p>Weddings · Parties · Corporate Events · Festivals</p>
    <button class="hero-btn" onclick="document.querySelector('.booking').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      Get Started
    </button>
  </section>

  <!-- SERVICES -->
  <section class="services">
    <h2>What We Offer</h2>
    <div class="cards">

      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">💍</div>
        <h3>Weddings</h3>
        <p>Beautiful ceremonies and receptions tailored to your love story.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">🎉</div>
        <h3>Parties</h3>
        <p>Birthday bashes, anniversaries, and private celebrations done right.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-icon">🏛️</div>
        <h3>Corporate</h3>
        <p>Professional galas, product launches, and company events.</p>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- BOOKING FORM -->
  <section class="booking">
    <h2>Book Your Event</h2>

    <form id="myForm" onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)">

      <label>Your Name</label>
      <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. Amara Osei" required>

      <label>Email Address</label>
      <input type="email" placeholder="amara@email.com" required>

      <label>Event Type</label>
      <select>
        <option>Wedding</option>
        <option>Birthday Party</option>
        <option>Corporate Event</option>
        <option>Other</option>
      </select>

      <label>Event Date</label>
      <input type="date" required>

      <label>Tell us about your event</label>
      <textarea placeholder="Describe your dream event..."></textarea>

      <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">SEND ENQUIRY</button>

    </form>

    <!-- Shows after form is submitted -->
    <div class="success" id="successMsg">
      🎉 Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
    </div>

  </section>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer>
    <p>© 2026 MyEvents. All rights reserved.</p>
  </footer>

  <!-- JAVASCRIPT -->
  <script>

    // This runs when the form is submitted
    function handleSubmit(event) {
      event.preventDefault(); // stops the page from refreshing

      // Hide the form
      document.getElementById('myForm').style.display = 'none';

      // Show the success message
      document.getElementById('successMsg').style.display = 'block';
    }

  </script>

</body>
</html>

What Each Part Teaches You

CodeConcept learned
display: flexLaying items side by side
display: gridCreating card layouts
@mediaMaking it work on mobile
:hoverReacting to mouse movement
onclickMaking buttons do things
getElementByIdFinding elements with JavaScript
event.preventDefault()Controlling form behaviour

Next steps once you're comfortable: try changing the colours, adding a new card, or changing the font. Breaking things and fixing them is the fastest way to learn! Let me know if any part needs more explanation.
